_comment: Tone rules for analyze_image_tone. Each rule matches when ALL conditions are satisfied.
_channels: r, g, b, a, luminance — each has mean/min/max from row+col CHOP averages

rules.name: near_white
rules.description: Image is very close to all white — nearly blown out

rules.name: near_black
rules.description: Image is very close to all black — nearly crushed

rules.name: low_contrast
rules.description: Image has very little dynamic range across rows/cols

rules.name: clipping_highlights
rules.description: Highlights are clipping in at least one channel

rules.name: color_cast_red
rules.description: Red channel dominates — red color cast

rules.name: color_cast_blue
rules.description: Blue channel dominates — cool/blue color cast

rules.name: midtone_balanced
rules.description: Image is well exposed with good tonal balance
